params.name: tenant
params.description: The code of the tenancy

params.name: _sort
params.description: The column to sort on. Append - to sort in descending order. If parameter is not given, no sorting will be done

params.name: _paginationLimit
params.description: Non-negative maximum number of entries to return. Default is 25

params.name: _paginationOffset
params.description: Non-negative number of entries to skip. Default is 0

items.docs: List all datasources the user has permission to see

params.description: The code of the tenancy

params.name: dataSourceCode
params.description: The code of the datasource

items.docs: Gets a datasource based on the code passed

info.name: Factset Gets the Data for the Datasource

params.name: tenant
params.description: The code of the tenancy

params.name: dataSourceCode
params.description: The code of the datasource

params.name: entityCodes
params.description: A series of query parameter used to filter the data for a datasource. This represents the entities for the datasource. E.g.: entityCodes=ACCOUNT&entityCodes=FUNDS

params.name: entityKeys
params.description: A series of query parameter used to filter the data for a datasource. This is the entity key value for an entity selection. E.g.: entityKeys=1&entityKeys=Test2

params.name: _paginationLimit
params.description: Non-negative maximum number of entries to return. Default is 25

params.name: _paginationOffset
params.description: Non-negative number of entries to skip. Default is 0

items.docs: Gets the data for the datasource. There are optional query parameters to filter the data

params.name: tenant
params.description: The code of the tenancy

params.name: entityCode
params.description: The code of the entity

params.name: _sort
params.description: The entity field to sort on. Can only be sorted on entity key, description or secondary key fields. Append "-" to sort in descending order. If no parameter given, it will be sorted by key field in ascending order by default

params.name: _paginationLimit
params.description: Non-negative maximum number of entries to return. Default is 25

params.name: _paginationOffset
params.description: Non-negative number of entries to skip. Default is 0

params.name: showAll
params.description: Whether to show all field values for each entity row. Value should either be 1 or 0. Default is 0 (false)

items.docs: Gets the entity values for the specified entity

params.name: tenant
params.description: The code of the tenancy

params.name: reportDefinitionCode
params.description: The code of the report definition

items.docs: Gets a report defintion based on the code specified

params.name: _paginationLimit

params.name: _paginationOffset
params.description: Non-negative number of entries to skip

items.docs: Gets a report instance object based on the ID passed

params.name: reportInstanceId
params.description: The id of the report instance

items.docs: Sends a request to cancel a report generation based on the report instance id passed

info.name: Factset Gets a List of Logs for the Report Instance Generation

params.name: tenant
params.description: The code of the tenancy

params.name: reportInstanceId
params.description: Used to validate that report file name belongs to the report instance passed

params.name: errorsOnly
params.description: If the parameter is set to true the endpoint should return just errors and warnings E.g: errorsOnly=true

params.name: _sort
params.description: The column to sort on. Can add - to sort

params.name: _paginationLimit
params.description: Non-negative maximum number of entries to return

params.name: _paginationOffset
params.description: Non-negative number of entries to skip

items.docs: Gets a list of logs for the generated report instance. Allows the user to sort on log message, type and date. Also allows for retrieving of just the errors & warnings'

info.name: Factset Gets a List of Report Instances

params.name: tenant
params.description: The code of the tenancy

params.name: reportDefinitionCode
params.description: Acts as a filter for the retrieval process. Filters the report instances that match the report definition code

params.name: entityCodes
params.description: A series of query parameters used to filter the report instances by entity code. E.g: entityCode=DATE&entityCode=SYSTEM_LANG

params.name: entityKeys
params.description: A series of query parameters used to filter the report instances by entity keys. E.g: entityKey=en-gb

params.name: sectionFilter
params.description: Acts as a filter for the retrieval process. Filters the report instances that match the section filter

params.name: outputFormat
params.description: Acts as a filter for the retrieval process. Filters the report instances that match the output format

params.name: _sort
params.description: The column to sort on. Append - to sort in descending order. If parameter is not given, sorting will be based on the report instance id in descending order

params.name: _paginationLimit
params.description: Non-negative maximum number of entries to return

params.name: _paginationOffset
params.description: Non-negative number of entries to skip

items.docs: Gets a list of report instances. This can be filtered down further by including query parameters in the URL. For example, a report definition id can be added so the only report instances returned are the ones with a matching id

params.name: tenant
params.description: The code of the tenancy

params.name: reportInstanceId
params.description: Used to validate that report file name belongs to the report instance passed

params.name: reportFileName
params.description: The report file name that has to be retrieved. report file name. E.g: xyz.pdf

items.docs: Get the generated file for a report instance. Users can fetch the generated report once the genration is finished. The report instance id and the report file name are passed in as path paramters
